perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video begins with a young woman with long dark hair talking directly to the camera while adjusting her hair. (2) She picks up a white makeup sponge and begins dabbing her face, transitioning into applying base makeup. (3) She uses a small brush to apply eyeshadow from a pink-toned palette, maintaining constant eye contact with the camera. (4) Throughout the video, a recurring overlay of a cartoon-style cat head on a man's body appears, along with several still photos of the woman with a man whose face is obscured by a bear emoji.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo lo-fi electronic background music begins. An energetic and friendly female voice starts speaking in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The music remains at a consistent volume as the female continues her narrative story about a personal relationship. (3) A brief segment features a distorted, robotic-sounding male voice speaking with a synthetic tone, simulating a phone call response. (4) The female voice returns to a conversational tone as the music slowly fades out at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓國男朋友初遇（下）' - Functional: Part title. (2) '還沒看第一集的人先去看！' - Hook: Directional instruction. (3) '大反轉即將公開' - Hook: Suspenseful variety-show style text. (4) '我先講為什麼喜歡上他' - Functional: Topic transition. (5) 'ISFJ的靈魂 = 很愛獨處' - Decorative: Personality trait labels. (6) '想繼續聽嗎' - Hook: Engagement call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Storytelling while applying makeup -> Plot reveal -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator; 1 male partner visible in photos and as an overlay
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long straight dark hair, wearing a grey ribbed sweater, with a polished makeup look.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with a white professional gaming or office chair and soft, neutral-colored walls.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a personal storytelling vlog (GRWM - Get Ready With Me) where the creator shares details of her romantic relationship with her Korean boyfriend, specifically focusing on personality types (MBTI) to build rapport and curiosity among her audience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of stylized cat overlays and bear emojis to protect identity of others; MBTI-focused storytelling.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-frequency text overlays and fast-paced editing typical of social media short-form content to maintain viewer retention.
